metadata.title: JIBB — Japan India Business Bureau
metadata.description: A cross-border innovation and industrial collaboration ecosystem connecting Japan and India through partnerships, trade, manufacturing, and technology.

hero.subtext: Connecting Japan and India through innovation, trade, manufacturing, and cross-border collaboration.

story.narration1: The morning sun fills the modern, glass-walled lounge of the JIBB Innovation Hub.
story.narration2: Engineers and entrepreneurs from two nations sketch ideas on smart boards.
story.narration3: Kenji, a tech executive from Tokyo, sits across from Aarav, a startup founder from Noida developing next-generation battery software.
story.kenji1: When my board first suggested expanding into the Indian market, I hesitated. The regulatory landscape seemed incredibly complex. I did not know how we would find reliable manufacturing partners.
story.aarav1: I understand exactly how you felt. We had the opposite problem. My team built the software, but we needed advanced Japanese hardware to make it work. Reaching out cold to companies in Tokyo went nowhere. We needed a bridge.
story.kenji2: That is exactly what the Japan India Business Bureau provides. The moment we became members, everything shifted. JIBB did not just give us a market report. They gave us a step-by-step entry strategy and handled the localization.
story.aarav2: For us, it was the partnership facilitation that changed the game. JIBB introduced us directly to you. Plus, working out of this Innovation Hub means we can actually test our integrated products. Having access to state-of-the-art laboratories right here speeds up our development by months.
story.kenji3: The facilities are world-class. Being able to co-innovate in the same room breaks down so many barriers. We share resources, reduce our costs, and build a better product together. Have you attended any of the diaspora networking events yet?
story.aarav3: I went to my first club meeting last week. I connected with three different investors and a government representative who walked me through new cross-border incentives. You cannot find that kind of access anywhere else.
story.kenji4: Exactly. You do not just join JIBB to get advice. You become a member to plug into a living, breathing ecosystem. They empower innovation and build lasting partnerships.
story.aarav4: We are proof of that. We brought the software, you brought the hardware, and JIBB brought us together.
story.ctaText: Expand your reach. Innovate without borders. Join JIBB today and start building your own success story.
story.storyDesc: Discover how JIBB connects Japanese manufacturing precision with Indian software innovation.
story.ctaBody1: Kenji and Aarav turned a complex cross-border challenge into a massive success story.
story.ctaBody2: You can do the same. When you become a member of the Japan India Business Bureau, you gain access to expert market entry support, trusted partnership networks, and world-class innovation labs.
story.ctaBody3: Expand your reach. Innovate without borders. Join JIBB today and start building your own success story.

aboutPage.title: About Us
aboutPage.subtitle: Connecting stakeholders, businesses, institutions, and governments to build a strategic industrial bridge between Japan and India.
aboutPage.introPara1: The Japan India Business Bureau (JIBB) is a non-profit organization dedicated to strengthening economic, industrial, and cultural ties between Japan and India. Positioned as a strategic bridge, we enable collaboration by connecting businesses, institutions, and government stakeholders across both ecosystems.
aboutPage.introPara2: With its headquarters in Tokyo, Japan, and an operational presence in Noida, India, JIBB actively facilitates cross-border partnerships, market entry, and long-term industrial cooperation. We support companies in navigating regulatory landscapes, identifying opportunities, and building sustainable business relationships in both countries.
aboutPage.whoWeAreDesc:
JIBB is a cross-border industry facilitation platform that brings together businesses, institutions, and government stakeholders from Japan and India. We are not just a network, but an enabler of meaningful partnerships built on trust, transparency, and long-term vision.

With a strong presence in both Tokyo and Noida, we operate at the intersection of two dynamic economies, helping organizations connect, collaborate, and grow beyond geographical and cultural boundaries. Our strength lies in understanding both ecosystems deeply and translating that understanding into actionable opportunities for our stakeholders.
aboutPage.whatWeDoDesc:
JIBB acts as a catalyst for India–Japan collaboration by creating structured pathways for businesses to engage, expand, and succeed.

We facilitate market entry and expansion by helping companies navigate regulatory frameworks, identify the right partners, and localize their operations effectively. Through curated networking platforms, industry events, and strategic introductions, we enable high-value collaborations and joint ventures.

We also drive knowledge exchange by bringing together industry leaders, policymakers, and innovators to share insights and explore emerging opportunities. From early-stage ideas to large-scale industrial partnerships, JIBB supports the entire journey—enabling innovation, fostering growth, and accelerating global expansion.
aboutPage.whatWeBelieve1Desc: We believe that the future of India–Japan collaboration lies in long-term partnerships built on mutual trust and shared value.
aboutPage.whatWeBelieve2Desc: We believe in bridging not just businesses, but cultures—because true collaboration goes beyond transactions. By fostering deeper understanding and alignment, we help organizations work together more effectively.
aboutPage.whatWeBelieve3Desc: We believe in innovation as a driver of growth, supporting ideas from their inception and enabling them to scale globally.
aboutPage.whatWeBelieve4Desc: Above all, we believe in creating impact—where collaboration leads to sustainable development, stronger industries, and a shared economic future for both nations.

visionPage.title: Vision & Mission
visionPage.subtitle: Fostering economic synergy, bridging cultural divides, and industrializing innovations from the ground up.
visionPage.visionDesc: To create a collaborative future where Japan and India stand together as global leaders in technology, industry, and sustainable growth.
visionPage.missionDesc: To drive meaningful partnerships and industrial progress by providing expert market entry support, fostering cross-border collaboration, and delivering world-class innovation incubation for businesses and governments.
visionPage.pillar1Desc: Bud innovations from scratch and then facilitate them in global expansions.
visionPage.pillar2Desc: Break the cultural differences between two nations to build trust.
visionPage.pillar3Desc: Promote trade, joint ventures, and localization opportunities between both ecosystems.

careersPage.title: Careers at JIBB
careersPage.subtitle: Building the future of the Tokyo–Noida industrial corridor.
careersPage.intro: At the Japan India Business Bureau (JIBB), we are building a team that thrives at the intersection of two of the world’s most dynamic economies. If you are curious, driven, and excited about cross-border collaboration, JIBB offers a platform where your work directly contributes to shaping India–Japan business relationships.
careersPage.subtext: We work closely with global companies, government stakeholders, and industry leaders across sectors like semiconductors, electronics, infrastructure, pharmaceuticals, and emerging technologies. Here, you don’t just take up a role, you become part of building something impactful from the ground up.
careersPage.whyJoin1: Work on real cross-border business projects between India and Japan
careersPage.whyJoin2: Exposure to high-growth sectors like semiconductors, EV, and advanced manufacturing
careersPage.whyJoin3: Opportunity to interact with global stakeholders and decision-makers
careersPage.whyJoin4: A fast-paced environment where ideas are encouraged and ownership is valued
careersPage.whyJoin5: Be part of building an organization from the ground up
careersPage.applyDesc: If you’re interested in any of the above roles, please share your resume along with a short note on why you’d like to work with JIBB at hitesh@npo-jibb.org and fill out the form below.

form.successDesc: Thank you for applying. We have received your details and our team will get in touch with you shortly.

consultant.title: Consultant
consultant.overview: As a Consultant, you will work closely with member organizations to understand industries, identify opportunities, and support strategic decision-making across India and Japan.
responsibilities: Conduct market research, industry analysis, and assessment of opportunities
Prepare industry reports, newsletters, and market forecasts
Support go-to-market strategy development for cross-border expansion
Identify potential partners, technologies, and business opportunities
Work closely with stakeholders across private and public sectors
requirements: Background in BTech with experience in consulting or KPO environments
Ability to understand both technical and business perspectives

translator.title: Translator (Japanese Language)
translator.qual: Graduate with proficiency in Japanese, Hindi, and English
translator.overview: You will play a key role in bridging communication between Indian and Japanese stakeholders, ensuring smooth and effective cross-border interactions.
responsibilities: Support verbal communication between Japanese and Indian teams
Assist in meetings, discussions, and technical coordination
Help overcome language and cultural barriers in business interactions
Support internal and external translation/communication requests
requirements: Strong verbal proficiency in Japanese (N3/N2 or higher preferred), Hindi, and English
Written proficiency in Japanese is an added advantage

bde.title: Business Development Executive
bde.overview: As a Business Development Executive, you will help expand JIBB’s network by engaging with companies, identifying opportunities, and driving memberships and collaborations.
responsibilities: Identify and engage potential members and corporate partners
Track innovations, challenges, and trends in electronics and semiconductors
Connect with decision-makers across Indian and Japanese companies
Present JIBB offerings and propose relevant bilateral solutions
Support growth of memberships and strategic collaborations
requirements: Strong understanding of electronics, electrical engineering, or semiconductor value chains
Excellent communication, outreach, and presentation skills
Interest in international business development and cross-border collaboration

servicesPage.title: Our Services
servicesPage.subtitle: Providing a comprehensive suite of cross-border solutions to ensure your India-Japan business success.

marketEntry.title: Market Entry Support
marketEntry.subtitle: Navigating regulatory and cultural landscapes with confidence.
marketEntry.para1: Expanding your business to a new country is a monumental step. JIBB simplifies this transition for Japanese companies entering India and Indian enterprises expanding to Japan.
marketEntry.para2: We provide clear, actionable go-to-market strategies, business registrations, physical office setups, and deep regulatory navigations customized to your specific industry.
marketEntry.step1Desc: Custom commercial intelligence, feasibility assessments, and step-by-step entry roadmaps.
marketEntry.step2Desc: Business registrations, environmental clearances, licensing, and local tax structuring support.
marketEntry.step3Desc: Sourcing physical offices, local banking setup, and key vendor management.

partnership.title: Partnership Facilitation
partnership.subtitle: Forging trust-based, high-value industrial relationships.
partnership.para1: Finding the right local partner is the single most critical factor for long-term bilateral success. JIBB uses its extensive directory to connect you with trusted leaders.
partnership.para2: Whether you are searching for joint venture candidates, local manufacturing plants, technology co-developers, or trade buyers, we handle the entire match-making process.
partnership.step1Desc: Direct introductions to verified, high-quality partners aligning with your technical standards.
partnership.step2Desc: Structuring equitable bilateral collaborations with sound legal and operational frameworks.
partnership.step3Desc: Access to exclusive bilateral buyer-seller meets and corporate summits.

localization.title: Localization Support
localization.subtitle: Adapting strategies to fit local business customs and consumer needs.
localization.para1: Bilateral trade requires deep alignment. We help companies translate and adapt their products, services, and corporate communications to fit the distinct cultural landscapes of both nations.
localization.para2: From language translations to cultural sensitivity workshops and targeted local PR campaigns, we build a seamless bridge for your team.
localization.step1Desc: Bilingual workshops to align corporate expectations and overcome working culture divides.
localization.step2Desc: Technical, legal, and conversational translation by native professional translators.
localization.step3Desc: Strategic marketing tailored for local consumers and positive media relations.

investment.title: Investment Support
investment.subtitle: Securing capital channels and unlocking bilateral incentives.
investment.para1: JIBB assists corporations and startups in navigating funding schemes, identifying tax benefits, and connecting with leading institutional investors.
investment.para2: We help you tap into bilateral investment corridors, secure government incentives (such as India's PLI schemes), and pitch effectively to cross-border VCs.
investment.step1Desc: Pitching platforms connecting high-potential startups to Japanese VCs and Indian angel syndicates.
investment.step2Desc: Navigating capital subsidies, tax holidays, and production-linked incentives (PLI).
investment.step3Desc: Financial due diligence, bilateral asset valuations, and capital transfer navigation.

membershipPage.title: Membership Plans
membershipPage.subtitle: Gain premium network access, utilize R&D labs, and unlock bilateral growth opportunities.
membershipPage.schedulerSubtitle: Book a 30-minute introductory meeting with our bilateral trade consultants via Calendly or MS Bookings.
membershipPage.bookingSuccessDesc: Thank you. Your meeting has been scheduled. You will receive a calendar invite with the join link shortly.

hubPage.title: Innovation Hub
hubPage.subtitle: Accelerating R&D, scaling cross-border technologies, and building next-gen solutions.
hubPage.labsSubtitle: Equipped with advanced technical sandboxes in Tokyo and Noida for premium research and industrial demonstration.
hubPage.incubationDesc: Giving emerging startups the foundations to scale globally. Our programs offer physical workspaces, strategic mentors, and direct access to vetted institutional funding in both countries.
hubPage.expertsSubtitle: A dynamic panel of industry experts, policy researchers, and corporate veterans facilitating bilateral success.

semiconductor.title: Electronics & Semiconductors Lab
semiconductor.desc: Testing and validation suites for integrated circuits, sensor arrays, and PCB architectures tailored to global manufacturing standards.

ev.title: Automotive & Electric Vehicles Lab
ev.desc: Battery testing sandboxes, EV charging software integration setups, and drivetrain analytics suites to accelerate clean transport models.

pharma.title: Pharmaceuticals & Advanced Materials
pharma.desc: Advanced labs supporting compound characterizations, active ingredient validations, and nanotechnology scaling for global distribution.

contactPage.title: Contact the Bureau
contactPage.subtitle: Get in touch with our bilateral trade specialists. We respond to all inquiries within 24 hours.
contactPage.tokyoAddr: Level 14, Hibiya Central Building, Tokyo, Japan
contactPage.noidaAddr: Phase 2, Sector 62, Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

form.name: Full Name
form.successDesc: Thank you for contacting JIBB. A trade specialist from our team will reach out to you shortly.
